noServerDescription: Add a RabbitMQ server connection to manage policies.
selectServerPrompt: Please select a RabbitMQ server to view policies.
noPoliciesDesc: No policies are configured on this server for the selected vhost.
createPolicyDesc: Define a pattern-based policy to apply settings to matching queues or exchanges.
editPolicyDesc: Update the definition, pattern, or priority of this policy.
deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete policy "{{policyName}}"? This action cannot be undone.
definitionDesc: Build the policy definition by selecting and configuring keys.
definitionEmpty: No keys added yet. Click "Add key" to get started.
definitionRequired: At least one definition key is required.
defTooltipMaxLength: Maximum number of messages in the queue. Oldest messages are dropped or dead-lettered when the limit is reached.
defTooltipMaxLengthBytes: Maximum total size of messages in the queue (bytes). Oldest messages are dropped or dead-lettered when the limit is reached.
defTooltipOverflow: Behaviour when the queue length limit is reached: drop the oldest message (drop-head), reject new publishes (reject-publish), or reject and dead-letter (reject-publish-dlx).
defTooltipMessageTtl: How long (ms) a message may remain in the queue before being discarded.
defTooltipExpires: How long (ms) a queue may remain unused before it is automatically deleted.
defTooltipDlx: Exchange to which messages are republished when they are dead-lettered.
defTooltipDlrk: Routing key used when dead-lettering messages. If omitted, the message's own routing key is used.
defTooltipDlStrategy: Dead-lettering strategy: at-most-once (no publisher confirm) or at-least-once (requires confirms, quorum queues only).
defTooltipDeliveryLimit: Maximum number of times a message may be delivered before it is dead-lettered. Quorum queues only.
defTooltipHaMode: Classic mirroring mode (deprecated). Prefer quorum queues instead.
defTooltipHaParams: Parameter for ha-mode: replica count when mode is "exactly", or node list when mode is "nodes".
defTooltipHaSyncMode: Whether mirrors synchronise automatically (automatic) or manually (manual) when they join.
defTooltipFederationUpstream: Name of the upstream to federate this queue or exchange from.
defTooltipFederationUpstreamSet: Name of the upstream set. Use "all" to include every configured upstream.
defTooltipAlternateExchange: Exchange to route unroutable messages to when they cannot be handled by this exchange.
defTooltipQueueMode: Set to "lazy" to move messages to disk as soon as possible, reducing memory usage.
errors.json.invalid: Must be a valid JSON object
errors.json.notObject: Must be a valid JSON object
errors.json.empty: Definition must contain at least one key
hintsDesc: Click a key to insert it into the definition.

toast.saveError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
